dimension_guidance.melodic_equivalence: 0 = wrong pitches/contour or drone; 1 = mostly correct but one microtonal/leap error or wrong register; 2 = melodic contour and pitches match the reference.
dimension_guidance.mode_fidelity: Judge whether the MELODY is genuinely in the stated mode (echos), not just whether the header matches. 0 = wrong echos or mode collapse to major/minor; 1 = mode stated but one modulation/fthora mishandled; 2 = melody faithfully realizes the mode.
dimension_guidance.notation_convention: 0 = wrong notation system, prose, or invalid/garbage tokens; 1 = right system, minor format slips; 2 = clean, conventional Western staff-pitch formatting.
dimension_guidance.meaning_preservation: 0 = added harmony, dropped ison, invented rhythm, or Western bias; 1 = one bias slip; 2 = faithful to source semantics incl. ison and microtonal intent.
